evals.name: classification-evaluation
evals.prompt: Evaluate the churn prediction model. The test data is at eda-workspace/test-datasets/churn_data.csv (target: 'churned'). Give me a full evaluation with confusion matrix, ROC curve, and feature importance.
evals.expected_output: Should compute classification metrics, confusion matrix, ROC curves, feature importance, error analysis, and actionable recommendations.

assertions.text: Computes accuracy, precision, recall, F1, and AUC-ROC
Produces a confusion matrix (TN, FP, FN, TP)
Generates or describes ROC curve with AUC value
Analyzes misclassified examples or error patterns
